falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 at any point in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 low would invalidate the 78% bottom pattern match, as that prior bottom held at ~4200; this would confirm continuation lower not a bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Persistent VIX elevation above 35 would indicate sustained panic rather than the capitulation-and-recovery pattern typical of the August 2024 bottom; the blowoff score of 38 suggests near-term exhaustion, but sustained VIX >35 means fear is accelerating not peaking

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further to -75bps or wider (more negative)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion would signal worsening recession probability, contradicting the bottom_2024_aug pattern which occurred during a disinflationary soft-landing narrative; this would shift macro regime from 'growth scare' to 'recession confirmation'

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
